overall.description: A first-person journey aboard a futuristic metro train in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The clip begins inside the train car with cybernetically enhanced passengers, passes through the 'Wollesen Street' station, and continues through an urban landscape of towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements and industrial smokestacks against a dark sky.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic metro train car with cyberpunk aesthetic. Passengers with visible cybernetic implants sit on benches, illuminated by artificial lighting and holographic displays. The train is in motion, visible through the windows showing blurred city lights outside.

agents.ego_description: panning view to observe more of the train interior while riding

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left along the moving train car, revealing additional passengers including a man in a distinctive yellow shirt and red vest. The interior shows overhead handrails and the length of the car as the train continues through the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro station platform with neon signage

train arrives at Wollesen Street station and comes to a stop

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at the Wollesen Street station, revealing an elevated platform with a prominent orange neon sign. The platform features benches, palm trees, and concrete architecture. The train comes to a stop, allowing a view of the station infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train tracks through dense cyberpunk cityscape

events.description: train departs station revealing expansive Night City skyline with towering skyscrapers
train passes large industrial smokestack with visible flames against the night sky

agents.ego_description: observing the Night City skyline and urban landscape from the moving train window

massive skyscraper with giant holographic advertisements projected on the facade

segments.scene_description: The train departs the station and travels through the heart of Night City, revealing a stunning cyberpunk cityscape. Massive skyscrapers with holographic advertisements dominate the skyline, including a distinctive industrial building marked with 03. The train passes an industrial smokestack with visible flames, while suspension cables from the elevated track frame the view of the dense urban architecture against the dark sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, artificial interior of a futuristic metro train into the sprawling, neon-lit expanse of Night City. It begins inside the car among cybernetically enhanced passengers illuminated by holographic displays, with blurred city lights streaking past the windows. As the camera pans left to reveal more passengers and the length of the car, the train slows and glides into the Wollesen Street station, shifting the view to an elevated platform marked by orange neon signs and concrete architecture. The scene then expands as the train departs the station, moving beyond the platform to reveal a dense urban skyline dominated by massive skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. Finally, the perspective passes an industrial building and a flaming smokestack, with suspension cables framing the towering architecture against a dark sky.
